topic: My shadow falls the wrong way from the sun, and lately it moves on its own.
title: My Shadow Falls the Wrong Way | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: My shadow points toward the sun, not away from it.
scenes.image_prompt: A long human shadow stretching toward a low bright sun on cracked pavement, impossible angle, dim afternoon haze, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I first noticed it in my own driveway last spring.
scenes.image_prompt: An empty suburban driveway at dusk, single long shadow across the concrete, low light, soft fog, vertical 9:16 framing
A back porch in pale morning light, a shadow falling the wrong direction across worn floorboards, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Then I saw it lift a hand while both of mine hung still.
scenes.image_prompt: A silhouette shadow on a wall with one arm raised, the figure casting it standing with arms down, low light, vertical 9:16 framing
An empty sidewalk at twilight, a single dark shadow stretched unnaturally long, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Neighbors looked, then looked away, pretending they saw nothing.
scenes.image_prompt: Distant figures on a quiet residential street turning away, blurred backs, dim evening light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I filmed it for an hour.
scenes.image_prompt: A phone propped on a fence recording a shadow on the grass, low light, soft grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: On playback, my shadow turned its head before I did.
scenes.image_prompt: A shadow of a head turned sideways on a brick wall while the silhouette faces forward, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: After that it began drifting farther from my feet each day.
scenes.image_prompt: A shadow separated from a standing figure by a visible gap on a sunlit lawn, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: This morning it stood up while I was still lying down.
scenes.image_prompt: A standing human shadow cast across a bedroom floor and bed, no person upright, dawn light through blinds, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I keep the curtains shut now, and the lights off.
scenes.image_prompt: A dark bedroom with heavy closed curtains, a thin line of light at the floor, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: But shadows do not need my light. They only need me.
scenes.image_prompt: A silhouette of a person against a faintly glowing window, a second shadow on the wall behind, low light, vertical 9:16 framing
